title: SINGLE COURSE EXAMS
content:
SINGLE COURSE EXAMS

SINGLE COURSE EXAMS

Dear Students,

Graduating students who wish to take the single course exam must apply via the Petition Tracking System on our Vocational School’s website (

https://online.uskudar.edu.tr/

) between

July 17–22, 2025

, by submitting their transcripts approved and signed by their academic advisor.

Exams for students who are deemed eligible to take the single course exam will be held

face-to-face on Friday, July 25, 2025, at 3:00 PM

at Üsküdar University, Çarşı Campus, on the 2nd floor (in classrooms to be announced).

Application documents can also be submitted

in person

to the SHMYO Secretariat (3rd Floor, Room R12).

We wish all our students the best of success.
